title: emilia sonchifolia var. javanica
intro: Emilia sonchifolia var. javanica, also known as Javanese fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used in various forms to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Emilia sonchifolia var. javanica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
